game.title.description: Name of the FreeCell game card.
game.title.notes: Use the locale's standard name for FreeCell. The name 'FreeCell' is widely recognised internationally.

game.description.description: One-line description on the FreeCell game card.

suit.spades.notes: Use the standard card-game name in the locale.

suit.hearts.notes: Use the standard card-game name in the locale.

suit.diamonds.notes: Use the standard card-game name in the locale.

suit.clubs.notes: Use the standard card-game name in the locale.

card.label.description: Accessibility label for a face-up card — 'Ace of Spades', etc.
card.label.notes: {{rank}} is rendered as 'A','2'-'10','J','Q','K' — do not translate single-letter ranks. {{suit}} is already-localized.

card.selected.description: Accessibility label for a face-up card that is selected.
card.selected.notes: Same conventions as card.label; add a '(selected)' annotation idiomatic to the locale.

pile.tableau.label.description: Accessibility label on a non-empty tableau column.
pile.tableau.label.notes: {{col}} is the 1-indexed column; {{count}} is the number of cards in it.

pile.tableau.empty.description: Accessibility label on an empty tableau column slot.

pile.foundation.empty.description: Accessibility label on an empty foundation pile.

pile.freecell.empty.description: Accessibility label on an empty free cell slot.

a11y.boardRegion.description: Accessibility region label wrapping the whole FreeCell board.
